items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Proud Heel Stretch
items.description:
Smile while you look like 
a professional Cheerleader!
- It's usually done by the flyers.

Works well with Pom-Pom's.
(Layered Clothing)

This Emote Includes Facial Animations
& was made for the:
[3.0] Woman Bundle - https://www.roblox.com/bundles/239/Woman
 - and -
BenereV2 Faces - https://www.roblox.com/users/1160312701/profile
Please make sure to use that, 
unless you have another bundle that works!

I tried my best to keep the anatomy as 
accurate and realistic as possible!

Matches This Emote: (https://www.roblox.com/catalog/119818392298899/Bow-and-Arrow)

Please use appropriately,
as this is a roleplay & proper use emote!
Inappropriate use might result in 
your account being at risk.
Thanks, for understanding.

Favorite this and join the group 
for more Idle emotes like this! - It really helps

PS: sorry again to the 60 people 
that bought the original version...
Id give y'all a special role in the group
if that makes up for it- </3

items.name: Speed Glitch+
items.description:
Speed Glitch: Equip your tool when the torso is pushed out all the way, and start moving without unequipping the tool (holding jump with a sideways key while in first person or shift lock works best!)

Noclip: Stand against a wall facing backwards and when the torso is pushed out the most, face your character towards the other side (Shift Lock or First Person needed)

⭐ Favorite for cheaper & follow for more! ⭐

This item follows all of Roblox's ToS & Guidelines, and specifically follows all rules & limitations set in place for emotes at the time of publishing.

❤️

items.name: Angel Wings
items.description:
Radiant, regal, and unmistakably classic — the Empyrean Reignment brings back that legendary old-school Roblox prestige. Its glowing white wings and golden crown spikes capture the spirit of the golden era, when avatars stood out with style, creativity, and pure nostalgia. Perfect for retro outfits, classic roleplay, and collectors who cherish true vintage Roblox history.

🪽 More Wings:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=wings&Category=1&CreatorName=classic+limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1
